subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Push a single package to the device and install it

globalOptions.name: -d
globalOptions.description: Direct command to the only connected USB device

globalOptions.name: -e
globalOptions.description: Direct command to the only running emulator

globalOptions.name: -s
globalOptions.description: Direct command to device with specific serial number

detectors.name: connected_devices
detectors.command: adb devices | grep -v 'List of devices attached' | grep 'device$' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No devices'
